query: SELECT id, agent_id, item_id, item_type, quantity, is_equipped, equipped_slot FROM agent_inventory WHERE item_id LIKE '%iron_sword%' OR item_id LIKE '%E_M001%' OR item_id LIKE '%武卷%' OR item_id LIKE '%I_SCROLL%' OR item_id LIKE '%I_M001%' LIMIT 20;
